waiver.reason: Current remote lane starts from a configured app state. This must become a dedicated clean-profile Computer Use scenario before the suite can honestly claim full main coverage.
waiver.exitCriteria: Add a clean-profile Computer Use scenario that starts from first launch, proves permissions/onboarding/nix setup surfaces, and records a passing report on the remote Mac.
